evidence_bundle_policy: Prefer gateway-owned snapshot/correlate bundles for application, alert, release, task, and correlation analysis. Skills use --format summary for first updates and use atomic commands only as fallback or requested deepening reads.

current_alert_first_pass_policy.acceptable_incompleteness: First answer may be based on the current-alert snapshot first page plus one representative alert path when it states the scope, prioritization reason, gaps, and next best read-only step.
current_alert_first_pass_policy.resource_incident_rule: App-less infrastructure alerts such as RDS, VPN, cluster, node, pod, deployment, or container alerts may be active resource incidents, but must not be turned into application root-cause claims without application mapping evidence.

controlled_action_policy.execution_gate: policy must be direct_allowed and human must explicitly confirm execution
controlled_action_policy.approval_required_behavior: recommend modify-appinstance ticket; do not bypass approval

sls_count_policy: SLS count intent should prefer `count log --view sls --query <expr>`; the legacy `search ... '| select count(1) as cnt'` form remains compatible. Never infer real counts from --limit or normal search response total.
sls_pagination_policy: SLS normal-log retrieval uses --page with --limit<=100; count first, then iterate pages. Backend can auto-segment bounded normal-log and single-row count(1) queries up to 24h, so clients must not emulate time slicing.
vlogs_count_policy: VictoriaLogs count intent must use `count log --view vlogs --query <LogsQL>`; keep field filters in LogsQL and never infer real counts from search limit or response total.

quick_triage_policy.parallel_wave_policy: Optimize first-pass latency with evidence bundles or independent parallel reads. Do not reduce evidence density just to reduce command count.
quick_triage_policy.application_status_lookup_fast_path: For status lookup requests such as 看状态 or 查状态, default missing env to production-b2b-cn, run only status application first, and escalate only when status is materially abnormal or the user asks for analysis/health/diagnosis/metrics/stronger evidence.
quick_triage_policy.application_health_snapshot: For natural analysis requests such as 分析应用状态, 分析健康度, or 看看有没有问题, run snapshot application --profile triage --format summary first. Fall back to status/error-logs/latency/traffic only when the snapshot surface is unavailable or incomplete.
quick_triage_policy.current_alert_first_pass: For 当前告警, phase 1 uses snapshot alert current --format summary. Do not expand pages or correlate before the first answer.

metric_evidence_policy.alert_quick: one targeted metric selected from alert content when the alert snapshot is unavailable or incomplete
metric_evidence_policy.confirmation_rule: confirmed root cause requires at least two evidence classes; otherwise report suspected

pressure_evidence_policy.current_cli_state: canonical node/cluster resources expose list/show/snapshot; use them for second-stage resource evidence, not before the first current-alert answer
pressure_evidence_policy.recommended_gateway_shape: Pressure evidence is exposed as read-only canonical resources and evidence bundle signals owned by ops-api-gateway/resourcekernel, backed by ops-ob k8s-node metrics and cluster overview APIs.
